title: Meeting Rooms II
hints: Sort the meetings by their start time.
Use a min heap to track the end times of ongoing meetings.
For each meeting, check if the earliest ending meeting has finished before the current meeting starts.
If a room is free (earliest end time <= current start time), reuse that room by updating its end time.
Otherwise, allocate a new room by adding the current meeting's end time to the heap.
The size of the heap at the end represents the minimum number of rooms needed.
